privileged_info_summary: The floorplan.dxf baseline file is a real, publicly-available architectural floor plan (1.07 MB, 967 entities, 24 layers) downloaded from the Apache-licensed jscad/sample-files GitHub repository. Task metadata claims are verified: baseline_entity_count=967, min_new_line_entities=8, output and source file paths are correct, and occupation context is Project Architect/Drafter. One metadata value (min_new_text_entities=5) is defined but unused in verification scripts. The data is not synthetic—it is genuine architectural construction documentation.
